title: House Committee on Science Space & Tech
text:
Lucas Demands Answers on $200 Million Energy Award to Company with Ties to the Chinese Communist Party
Lucas Introduces Bill to Accelerate Unmanned Aircraft Systems Development and Deployment
The legislation is critical for developing the domestic unmanned aerial systems and Advanced Air Mobility industries, which must be strong, safe, and secure to compete with China.
Lucas and Weber Seek Information on New Multi-Billion Dollar Office of Clean Energy Demonstrations
Ranking Member Lucas and Chairwoman Johnson Urge FCC to Limit Spectrum Sharing to Avoid Harmful Interference in the 1675-1680 MHz Band
